rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation-level output features or auxiliary variables
Place guarantees in component type scope only when using visible feature names and case-provided thresholds
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Trace unresolved references to visible AADL features or eq helpers in the same annex
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture when references are unresolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use unresolved references in guarantees
Do not mix incompatible types in expressions
